name: NIST AI RMF Crosswalks
owner: National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST)
description: NIST-published cross-framework mappings between AI RMF 1.0 and other AI governance frameworks (ISO/IEC 23894, OECD AI Principles + Executive Order on AI + Blueprint for an AI Bill of Rights). This directory is a collection of crosswalk documents, each in its own subdirectory.
relationToCloudSecurity: AI RMF crosswalks help cloud-hosted AI implementers translate controls between frameworks.
relationToAISecurity: Direct AI-governance bridge between NIST's flagship AI RMF and other major AI frameworks.

license.notes: Work of NIST is in the US public domain (17 USC §105).

lifecycle.notes: Rolling additions as new crosswalks are published.

current_extraction.notes: Captured the NIST AI Risk Management Framework Crosswalks index from the AIRC knowledge base. Individual crosswalk documents (AI RMF ↔ ISO/IEC 42001, NIST AI 600-1, EU AI Act, etc.) are linked from this page.

extraction_history.notes: Collection. See subdirectories for individual crosswalk documents.

notes: Parent collection. Individual crosswalks have per-directory metadata.
